description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe featuring a robust, dark wooden handle with a cylindrical shape and reinforced metal bands near the head and base. The axe head is forged from steel, with two symmetrical, broad blades extending outward, each with a sharp, angular edge and a pointed tip. The central socket of the axe head is thick and rounded, securely fitted onto the handle, while the opposite end of the handle terminates in a metal spike, adding to its versatility as a weapon or tool. The wood of the handle appears slightly textured, with a visible grain and a mid-brown coloration, while the metal components are a matte, silvery-gray with a subtle sheen. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative engravings or markings, suggesting a focus on function over ornamentation. This axe would be suitable for heavy-duty tasks or as a display piece in a historical or urban-themed setting.
description: A double-headed steel axe with a dark wooden handle, reinforced metal bands, and a pointed metal spike at the base. The design is functional and robust, with a matte finish and no visible markings.
description_view_0: The axe is shown with both broad steel blades and the full length of the wooden handle visible, highlighting the double-edged design and the pointed metal spike at the base.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the narrow profile of the axe, showing the thickness of the blades and the alignment of the handle, with the spike and blade edges visible in silhouette.
description_view_2: Both blades are visible from the side, displaying their symmetrical shape and the secure mounting to the handle, as well as the reinforced metal band near the head.
description_view_3: The axe is viewed head-on, showing the width of the blades and the central socket, with the handle and spike receding into the background.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with visible grain, reinforced by a metal band, and a pointed metal spike at the base; grip is smooth with no pronounced ergonomic features.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed symmetrical steel blade with broad, angular edges and pointed tips; no beard or decorative features, functional and robust.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade socket fitted over the handle and reinforced by a metal band.
